testcase.name: test_lola_haircut_returns_care_not_travel

failure.message:
AssertionError: 'Lola needs a haircut' should detect 'care' pillar, got '' assert '' == 'care'
- care

testcase.failure: tests/test_mira_p0_fixes.py:142: in test_lola_haircut_returns_care_not_travel assert pillar == "care", f"'Lola needs a haircut' should detect 'care' pillar, got '{pillar}'" E AssertionError: 'Lola needs a haircut' should detect 'care' pillar, got '' E assert '' == 'care' E E - care

testcase.name: test_buy_dog_food_returns_dine

failure.message: AssertionError: 'Buy dog food' should detect 'dine' or 'shop' pillar, got '' assert '' in ['dine', 'shop']

testcase.failure: tests/test_mira_p0_fixes.py:168: in test_buy_dog_food_returns_dine assert pillar in ["dine", "shop"], f"'Buy dog food' should detect 'dine' or 'shop' pillar, got '{pillar}'" E AssertionError: 'Buy dog food' should detect 'dine' or 'shop' pillar, got '' E assert '' in ['dine', 'shop']

testcase.name: test_plan_birthday_party_returns_celebrate

failure.message:
AssertionError: 'Plan Lola birthday party' should detect 'celebrate' pillar, got '' assert '' == 'celebrate'
- celebrate

testcase.failure: tests/test_mira_p0_fixes.py:193: in test_plan_birthday_party_returns_celebrate assert pillar == "celebrate", f"'Plan Lola birthday party' should detect 'celebrate' pillar, got '{pillar}'" E AssertionError: 'Plan Lola birthday party' should detect 'celebrate' pillar, got '' E assert '' == 'celebrate' E E - celebrate

testcase.name: test_book_ola_cab_returns_travel

failure.message:
AssertionError: 'Book an Ola cab' should detect 'travel' pillar, got '' assert '' == 'travel'
- travel

testcase.failure: tests/test_mira_p0_fixes.py:221: in test_book_ola_cab_returns_travel assert pillar == "travel", f"'Book an Ola cab' should detect 'travel' pillar, got '{pillar}'" E AssertionError: 'Book an Ola cab' should detect 'travel' pillar, got '' E assert '' == 'travel' E E - travel

testcase.name: test_car_trip_matches_travel

failure.message:
AssertionError: 'car trip' should detect 'travel' pillar, got '' assert '' == 'travel'
- travel

testcase.failure: tests/test_mira_p0_fixes.py:312: in test_car_trip_matches_travel assert pillar == "travel", f"'car trip' should detect 'travel' pillar, got '{pillar}'" E AssertionError: 'car trip' should detect 'travel' pillar, got '' E assert '' == 'travel' E E - travel
